problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
